zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Berney於大約1241年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Richard de Berney28歲，母親Catharine de Aygney24歲。他於1263年與Catherine de Harsyk在英國諾福爾可維其加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1301年在英國諾福爾可維其加姆享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維其加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Berney于大约1241年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Richard de Berney28岁，母亲Catharine de Aygney24岁。他于1263年与Catherine de Harsyk在英国諾福爾可維其加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1301年在英国諾福爾可維其加姆享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維其加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Berney was born about 1241, in Norfolk, England, his father, Richard de Berney, was 28 and his mother, Catharine de Aygney, was 24. He married Catherine de Harsyk in 1263, in Witchingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1301, in Witchingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Witchingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Berney est né environ 1241, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Berney, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catharine de Aygney, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Harsyk en 1263, à Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1301, à Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Witchingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Berney um 1241 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Berney 28 und seine Mutter Catharine de Aygney 24. Er hat 1263 in Witchingham, Norfolk, England Catherine de Harsyk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1301 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Witchingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Witchingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Berney è nato il circa 1241 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Richard de Berney, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Catharine de Aygney, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Harsyk nel 1263, nel Witchingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1301, nel Witchingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Witchingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Berneyが約1241年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Richard de Berneyは28歳，母Catharine de Aygneyは24歳であった。1263年にイギリスノーフォルクウィトチンガムでCatherine de Harsykと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1301年にイギリスノーフォルクウィトチンガムで62歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウィトチンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Berney(이)가 대략 1241년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Berney(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharine de Aygney(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1263년 영국 노르폴크 윗친그함에서 Catherine de Harsyk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1301년 영국 노르폴크 윗친그함에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윗친그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Berney nasceu aproximadamente 1241, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Berney, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catharine de Aygney, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Harsyk em 1263, em Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1301, em Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Berney родился около 1241 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Berney было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharine de Aygney, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Harsyk в 1263 г. в местности вичингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1301 г. в местности вичингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности вичингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Berney nació aproximadamente 1241, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Berney, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catharine de Aygney, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Catherine de Harsyk en 1263, en Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1301, en Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Witchingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
